# [PKT-PRV-073](task-0140): Provider Data Quality Monitoring

## Purpose

Implement provider data quality monitoring.

## Scope

- Monitoring logic
- Metrics
- Alerts

## Implementation

1. Implement monitoring
2. Add metrics
3. Add alerts

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Monitoring works
2. Metrics collected
3. Alerts sent
